metadata.description: Location for all resources
Environment short name (dev, test, prod)
Unique workload suffix (lowercase, 3-12 chars)
Microsoft Entra administrator UPN for Azure SQL
Microsoft Entra administrator object ID for Azure SQL
Address prefix for the virtual network used by App Service integration and private endpoints
Address prefix for the App Service integration subnet
Address prefix for the private endpoint subnet
SQL server public network access mode
Key Vault public network access mode
Optional shared secret used between the dashboard web app and the worker function app
Shared secret used to authorize internal bootstrap and ingestion routes on the dashboard web app
Session secret used by the dashboard web app session middleware
Optional subscription IDs where the dashboard web app managed identity should receive Reader access for subscription discovery and read-only ARM queries.

Optional management group names where the dashboard web app managed identity should receive Reader access for subscription discovery and read-only ARM queries. Preferred for larger estates; keep subscription IDs for customers without management groups.

Optional subscription IDs where the dashboard web app managed identity should receive GroupQuota Request Operator for quota apply writes. Include every subscription that can participate in quota moves.

Optional management group names where the dashboard web app managed identity should receive GroupQuota Request Operator for quota apply writes. Preferred for larger estates; keep subscription IDs for customers without management groups.
Optional management group ID used by the dashboard quota discovery UI when tenant-wide management group enumeration is not permitted.
Existing Azure SQL server name to reuse. Provide the short resource name, not the FQDN.
Resource group that contains the existing Azure SQL server. Defaults to the deployment resource group when empty.
Existing Azure SQL database name to reuse when the dashboard should attach to an existing database on the existing SQL server.
Existing Key Vault name to reuse.
Resource group that contains the existing Key Vault. Defaults to the deployment resource group when empty.
Existing storage account name to reuse for the worker host.
Resource group that contains the existing worker storage account. Defaults to the deployment resource group when empty.
Optional subscription IDs where the worker managed identity should receive subscription-level RBAC roles for live placement and pricing lookups.

Optional management group names where the worker managed identity should receive RBAC roles for live placement and pricing lookups. Preferred for larger estates; keep subscription IDs for customers without management groups.
Assign Compute Recommendations Role on each subscription listed in workerSubscriptionRbacSubscriptionIds.
Assign Cost Management Reader on each subscription listed in workerSubscriptionRbacSubscriptionIds.
Assign Billing Reader on each subscription listed in workerSubscriptionRbacSubscriptionIds.
Enable Microsoft Entra sign-in for the dashboard app routes.
Microsoft Entra tenant ID used by the dashboard auth flow.
Microsoft Entra application (client) ID used by the dashboard auth flow.
Microsoft Entra application client secret used by the dashboard auth flow.
Optional redirect URI for the dashboard auth callback. Defaults to the Azure Web App callback URL when omitted.
Optional Entra group object ID whose members should receive admin access in the dashboard.

siteConfig.appSettings: [flatten(createArray(createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', reference('appInsights').ConnectionString), createObject('name', 'Dashboard__Mode', 'value', 'MVP'), createObject('name', 'SQL_SERVER', 'value', variables('effectiveSqlServerFqdn')), createObject('name', 'SQL_DATABASE', 'value', variables('effectiveSqlDatabaseName')), createObject('name', 'SQL_AUTH_MODE', 'value', 'managed-identity'), createObject('name', 'CAPACITY_WORKER_BASE_URL', 'value', format('https://{0}', reference('functionApp').defaultHostName)), createObject('name', 'CAPACITY_RECOMMEND_USE_DIRECT_API', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'CAPACITY_RECOMMEND_SUBSCRIPTION_ID', 'value', subscription().subscriptionId), createObject('name', 'CAPACITY_RECOMMEND_WORKER_TIMEOUT_MS', 'value', '180000'), createObject('name', 'CAPACITY_WORKER_SHARED_SECRET', 'value', variables('workerSharedSecretKeyVaultReference')), createObject('name', 'INGEST_API_KEY', 'value', variables('ingestApiKeyKeyVaultReference')), createObject('name', 'SESSION_SECRET', 'value', variables('sessionSecretKeyVaultReference')), createObject('name', 'QUOTA_MANAGEMENT_GROUP_ID', 'value', parameters('quotaManagementGroupId')), createObject('name', 'INGEST_MANAGEMENT_GROUP_NAMES', 'value', join(parameters('webReaderManagementGroupNames'), ',')), createObject('name', 'NODE_ENV', 'value', 'production'), createObject('name', 'WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION', 'value', '~20'), createObject('name', 'AUTH_ENABLED', 'value', string(parameters('authEnabled')))), if(not(empty(parameters('entraTenantId'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'ENTRA_TENANT_ID', 'value', parameters('entraTenantId'))), createArray()), if(not(empty(parameters('entraClientId'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'ENTRA_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('entraClientId'))), createArray()), if(not(empty(variables('entraClientSecretKeyVaultReference'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'ENTRA_CLIENT_SECRET', 'value', variables('entraClientSecretKeyVaultReference'))), createArray()), createArray(createObject('name', 'AUTH_REDIRECT_URI', 'value', variables('effectiveAuthRedirectUri'))), if(not(empty(parameters('adminGroupId'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'ADMIN_GROUP_ID', 'value', parameters('adminGroupId'))), createArray()), createArray(createObject('name', 'REACT_PROTOTYPE_ENABLED', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'SESSION_STORE_SQL_ENABLED', 'value', if(parameters('authEnabled'), 'true', 'false')), createObject('name', 'WEBSITE_DNS_SERVER', 'value', '168.63.129.16'), createObject('name', 'WEBSITE_VNET_ROUTE_ALL', 'value', '1'), createObject('name', 'SCM_DO_BUILD_DURING_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', 'true'))))]
